rows.description: Comptus Collegij a Secundo Die novem bris 1728 ad eanden Diem Revolutionum.
rows.notes: Description based on gemini-flash, which provided a more accurate transcription of the full header text compared to gpt-5-mini. Both extractors agree on row type and absence of amounts.
rows.section_header: Comptus Collegij a Secundo Die novem bris 1728 ad eanden Diem Revolutionum.

rows.notes: Added missing row from gpt-5-mini. This appears as a distinct sub-header in the ledger. gemini-flash missed this row entirely.

rows.description: Guineas pro Anno viz pro Sem: ad Annunc: 1727 a Dom d
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misidentified the description ('Quittances' vs 'Guineas') and incorrectly assigned an amount (60 0 0) to this line, which visually has no amount. The amount belongs to the subsequent line.
rows.english_description: Guineas paid as the annual fee for the Lady Day (Annunciation) term 1727 from Mr D (named in ledger as 'Dom d').
rows.english_description_with_amount: Guineas paid as the annual fee for the Lady Day term 1727 from Mr D (amount not recorded).

rows.description: Heirijs pro alter. Sem: ad Mich: 1728, a Mr. Johns
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini was completely misaligned and incorrect for this and the previous row, failing to correctly extract this entry and its amount. Visual check confirms '63 00 00'.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly rent received at Michaelmas 1728 from Mr Johns.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly rent received at Michaelmas 1728 from Mr Johns, amounting to £63 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini had an inaccurate description ('Wittersham' vs 'Nithersham') and amount (40 0 0 vs 39 0 0) for this visual row.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Long Nithersham received at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Long Nithersham received at Michaelmas, amounting to £39 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amount. gpt-5-mini was off on both for this visual row.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Minsearch covering a two-year (biennial) period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Minsearch covering a two-year period, amounting to £40 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini had a slightly different description and incorrect amount.
rows.english_description: Payment from South Newington covering a sesquiannual (one and a half year) period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from South Newington for one and a half years, amounting to £87 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description and amount. gpt-5-mini misread 'Arlington' as 'Warrington'.
rows.english_description: Receipt from the rectory of Arlington covering a sesquiannual period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Arlington Rectory for one and a half years, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amount. gpt-5-mini misread the description ('Carrington') and amount (52 12 0).
rows.english_description: Payment from Garington covering a three-year (triennial) period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Garington for three years, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amount. gpt-5-mini misread the amount (8 10 10).
rows.english_description: Receipt from Meriton covering an extended multi‑year period (noted as octennial with a half-year).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Meriton for the stated octennial with a half period, amounting to £52 12s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amount, including the 0.5 fraction (clear half-penny symbol). gpt-5-mini was significantly incorrect on amount and description.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Face Hill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Face Hill, amounting to £8 10s 10½d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description and amount. The pounds digit '40' is partially obscured by an ink mark but visually confirmed to be '40' rather than gpt-5-mini's '7'. gemini-flash's note explains the ambiguity and reasoning well. Increased confidence from 0.8 to 0.9 after visual confirmation.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Thorp covering an eight‑year (octennial) period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Thorp for an eight‑year period, amounting to £40 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misidentified the description ('Palington Vicar') and incorrectly assigned an amount (5 7 2) that belongs to the subsequent line. Visual check confirms no amount on this line.
rows.english_description: Receipt described as due to the vicar (the vicar's portion).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt described as due to the vicar (amount not recorded).

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amount. gpt-5-mini's corresponding row had the correct amount but the wrong description, indicating continued misalignment.
rows.english_description: Annual quint (one‑fifth) rent received.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual quint rent received, amounting to £5 7s 2d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amount. gpt-5-mini had the description but an incorrect amount (0 2 6) for this visual row.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amount. gpt-5-mini had a good description but an incorrect amount (0 0 2 0.5) for this visual row.
